root.description: Whether cluster should be created (affects nearly all resources)
root.name: create

root.description: Whether the proxy includes detailed information about SQL statements in its logs
root.name: debug_logging

root.description: One or more SQL statements for the proxy to run when opening each new database connection
root.name: init_query

root.description: Specifies the number of days you want to retain log events in the log group
root.name: log_group_retention_in_days

root.description: The path to the role
root.name: iam_role_path

root.description: The maximum session duration (in seconds) that you want to set for the specified role
root.name: iam_role_max_session_duration

root.description: A Boolean parameter that specifies whether Transport Layer Security (TLS) encryption is required for connections to the proxy
root.name: require_tls

root.description: A map of tags to apply to the RDS Proxy
root.name: proxy_tags

root.description: A map of tags to apply to the CloudWatch log group
root.name: log_group_tags

root.description: The description of the role
root.name: iam_role_description

root.description: The name of the role policy. If omitted, Terraform will assign a random, unique name
root.name: iam_policy_name

root.description: Default authentication scheme that the proxy uses for client connections to the proxy and connections from the proxy to the underlying database. Valid values are NONE and IAM_AUTH. Defaults to NONE
root.name: default_auth_scheme

root.description: Network type of the DB proxy endpoint. Valid values are IPV4, IPV6 and DUAL. Defaults to IPV4. If IPV6 is specified, the subnets associated with the proxy must be IPv6-only, and target_connection_network_type must be IPV6
root.name: endpoint_network_type

root.description: The number of seconds that a connection to the proxy can be inactive before the proxy disconnects it
root.name: idle_client_timeout

root.description: Determines whether DB cluster is targeted by proxy
root.name: target_db_cluster

root.description: Map of DB proxy endpoints to create and their attributes
root.name: endpoints
root.type:
map(object({
    name                   = optional(string)
    vpc_subnet_ids         = list(string)
    vpc_security_group_ids = optional(list(string))
    target_role            = optional(string)
    tags                   = optional(map(string), {})
  }))

root.description: The ARN of the KMS Key to use when encrypting log data
root.name: log_group_kms_key_id

root.description: Specified the log class of the log group. Possible values are: `STANDARD` or `INFREQUENT_ACCESS`
root.name: log_group_class

root.description: Configuration block(s) with authorization mechanisms to connect to the associated instances or clusters
root.name: auth
root.type:
map(object({
    auth_scheme               = optional(string)
    client_password_auth_type = optional(string)
    description               = optional(string)
    iam_auth                  = optional(string)
    secret_arn                = optional(string)
    username                  = optional(string)
  }))

root.description: One or more VPC security group IDs to associate with the new proxy
root.name: vpc_security_group_ids

root.description: One or more VPC subnet IDs to associate with the new proxy
root.name: vpc_subnet_ids

root.description: The maximum size of the connection pool for each target in a target group
root.name: max_connections_percent

root.description: Controls how actively the proxy closes idle database connections in the connection pool
root.name: max_idle_connections_percent

root.description: DB instance identifier
root.name: db_instance_identifier

root.description: Whether to use unique name beginning with the specified `iam_policy_name`
root.name: use_policy_name_prefix

root.description: List of KMS Key ARNs to allow access to decrypt SecretsManager secrets
root.name: kms_key_arns

root.description: Network type that the proxy uses to connect to the target database. Valid values are IPV4 and IPV6. Defaults to IPV4
root.name: target_connection_network_type

root.description: The kind of database engine that the proxy will connect to. Valid values are `MYSQL` or `POSTGRESQL`
root.name: engine_family

root.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role that the proxy uses to access secrets in AWS Secrets Manager
root.name: role_arn

root.description: The number of seconds for a proxy to wait for a connection to become available in the connection pool
root.name: connection_borrow_timeout

root.description: Determines whether DB instance is targeted by proxy
root.name: target_db_instance

root.description: Specifies to force detaching any policies the role has before destroying it
root.name: iam_role_force_detach_policies

root.description: A map of tags to apply to the IAM role
root.name: iam_role_tags

root.description: Determines whether an IAM policy is created
root.name: create_iam_policy

root.description: Determines whether Terraform will create/manage the CloudWatch log group or not. Note - this will fail if set to true after the log group has been created as the resource will already exist
root.name: manage_log_group

root.description: A map of tags to add to all resources
root.name: tags

root.description: DB cluster identifier
root.name: db_cluster_identifier

root.description: Determines whether an IAM role is created
root.name: create_iam_role

root.description: The name of the role. If omitted, Terraform will assign a random, unique name
root.name: iam_role_name

root.description: The ARN of the policy that is used to set the permissions boundary for the role
root.name: iam_role_permissions_boundary

root.description: Region where the resource(s) will be managed. Defaults to the Region set in the provider configuration
root.name: region

root.description: The identifier for the proxy. This name must be unique for all proxies owned by your AWS account in the specified AWS Region. An identifier must begin with a letter and must contain only ASCII letters, digits, and hyphens; it can't end with a hyphen or contain two consecutive hyphens
root.name: name

root.description: Each item in the list represents a class of SQL operations that normally cause all later statements in a session using a proxy to be pinned to the same underlying database connection
root.name: session_pinning_filters

root.description: Whether to use unique name beginning with the specified `iam_role_name`
root.name: use_role_name_prefix

root.description: The ID for the proxy
root.name: proxy_id

root.description: Identifier representing the DB Instance or DB Cluster target
root.name: proxy_target_rds_resource_id

root.description: Type of target. e.g. `RDS_INSTANCE` or `TRACKED_CLUSTER`
root.name: proxy_target_type

root.description: Array containing the full resource object and attributes for all DB proxy endpoints created
root.name: db_proxy_endpoints

root.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the CloudWatch log group
root.name: log_group_arn

root.description: Stable and unique string identifying the IAM role
root.name: iam_role_unique_id

root.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the proxy
root.name: proxy_arn

root.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the default target group
root.name: proxy_default_target_group_arn

root.description: The name of the CloudWatch log group
root.name: log_group_name

root.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role that the proxy uses to access secrets in AWS Secrets Manager.
root.name: iam_role_arn

root.description: The endpoint that you can use to connect to the proxy
root.name: proxy_endpoint

root.description: The ID for the default target group
root.name: proxy_default_target_group_id

root.description: The name of the default target group
root.name: proxy_default_target_group_name

root.description: Hostname for the target RDS DB Instance. Only returned for `RDS_INSTANCE` type
root.name: proxy_target_endpoint

root.description: Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the DB instance or DB cluster. Currently not returned by the RDS API
root.name: proxy_target_target_arn

root.description: DB Cluster identifier for the DB Instance target. Not returned unless manually importing an RDS_INSTANCE target that is part of a DB Cluster
root.name: proxy_target_tracked_cluster_id

root.description: Identifier of `db_proxy_name`, `target_group_name`, target type (e.g. `RDS_INSTANCE` or `TRACKED_CLUSTER`), and resource identifier separated by forward slashes (/)
root.name: proxy_target_id

root.description: Port for the target RDS DB Instance or Aurora DB Cluster
root.name: proxy_target_port

root.description: IAM role name
root.name: iam_role_name
